MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vincent J. Demartini, Esq. for plaintiff Denis O'Sullivan.
Barbara Massey, Esq., appearing on limited scope representation for defendants, Victor Moore and Kimberly Giovanni, who are also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. The parties specifically waive court reporting services. Trial date vacated.
